name: RV Prefetch
description: Android RecyclerView is attempting to pre-populate off screen views.

name: RV OnBindView
description: Android RecyclerView is rebinding a View. If this is taking a lot of time, consider optimizing your layout or make sure you are not doing extra operations in onBindViewHolder call.

name: RV OnLayout
description: Android RecyclerView.OnLayout has been called by the View system. If this shows up too many times in Systrace, make sure the children of RecyclerView do not update themselves directly. This will cause a full re-layout, but when it happens via the Adapter notifyItemChanged, RecyclerView can avoid full layout calculation.

name: /^Choreographer#doFrame/
description: Core logic of render on Android system mainly involves the following tasks: 1. Calculating dropped frames; 2. Recording frame rendering information; 3. Sequentially executing input, animation, animation insets, traversal and commit callbacks.

name: traversal
description: Execute traversal callbacks. Handles layout and draw.  Runs after all other asynchronous messages have been handled.

name: animation
description: Execute animation callbacks.

name: layout
description: Core logic of layout on Android system: Call the layout method of the root view to update the layout information of the rendering tree.

name: draw
description: Core logic of draw onAndroid system: Call the draw method of the root view, recursively render the entire view hierarchy, and finally submit the rendering results to the hardware renderer.

name: meature
description: Core logic of measure on Android system: Call the measure method of the root view, which will recursively call the measure method of its child views layer by layer.

name: /^LynxRuntime::Invoke/
description: Invoke task on background scripting thread(historically known as 'JS Thread').

name: /^LynxEngine::Invoke/
description: Invoke task on Engine Thread(historically known as 'Tasm Thread').

name: /^LynxLayout::Invoke/
description: Invoke task on Layout Thread.

name: LynxRuntime::AfterInvoked
description: Perform some common minor tasks after completing the main task.

name: LynxEngine::AfterInvoked
description: Perform some common minor tasks after completing the main task.

name: LynxLayout::AfterInvoked
description: Perform some common minor tasks after completing the main task.

name: MessageLoop::FlushTasks
description: MessageLoop is used to manage thread tasks. FlushTasks retrieves one or more tasks from the thread task queue and executes them until the task queue is empty or the maximum restriction duration is reached.

name: LynxEngine::LoadTemplate
description: Load the Lynx bundle.

name: LynxEngine::LoadTemplateBundle
description: Load the Lynx bundle with templateBundle. Reference: @link{https://lynxjs.org/api/lynx-native-api/template-bundle.html}

name: LynxLoadTemplate
description: Load the Lynx bundle, which includes four parts: load, parse, framework rendering, and pixel pipeline. 1. Load: request the bundle; 2. Parse: parse bundle for subsequent pipeline process; 3. Framework rendering: create and synchronize its internal representation of the UI with the actual element tree in the engine through element manipulation. @link{https://lynxjs.org/guide/spec.html#frameworkrendering-framework-rendering}; 4. Pixel pipeline: processes element tree into pixels that are displayed on the users' screen. @link{https://lynxjs.org/guide/spec.html#enginepixeling-pixel-pipeline};

name: FiberElement::FlushActions
description: At this stage, based on the attribute of the element, the computed style and prop bundle of the element are generated and synchronized to the layout node. This stage will also create and modify layout node tree. At the same time, it will also generate platform UI operations.

name: App::loadScript
description: Load, parse, and execute @args{url}.

name: LoadJSApp
description: Load, parse and execute background scripts @args{url}.

name: RunningInJS
description: Execute @args{name} on background scripting thread(historically known as "JS Thread").

name: CallJSFunction
description: Execute the @args{module_name}.@args{method} method on the background scripting thread (historically known as "JS Thread").

name: CallJSClosureEvent
description: Execute the callbacks for the @args{type} event on background scripting thread (historically known as "JS Thread").

name: QuickContext::GetAndCall
description: Get and call the main script's global function: @args{name}.

name: QuickContext::Call
description: Call @args{name} on Engine thread (historically known as "Tasm Thread").

name: FiberCreateWrapperElement
description: Create a <wrapper/> element, a special element provided by the FiberElement API designed to serve as a low-cost container.

name: UpdateComponentData
description: Update component Data. Component name is @args{componentName}. Updated Keys is @args{Keys}. `Keys` represent the state keys updated in this update.

name: UpdateComponentInfo
description: Update the component's info, such as path, id, and the compiled render function.

name: LynxUpdateDataByJS
description: RootComponent update triggered by background scripting thread(historically known as "JS Thread").

name: LynxBatchedUpdateData
description: Batch update for component on Engine Thread(historically known as "Tasm Thread").

name: LynxUpdateData
description: Root Component update. Updated Keys is @args{Keys}. Keys represent the keys of the state that were updated in this update. defaultData represents the current state keys of the root component.

name: LynxUpdateComponentDataByJS
description: Component update triggered by background scripting thread (historically known as "JS Thread"). A component update can be triggered for multiple reasons.

name: DispatchChildrenForDiff
description: Update the attributes of the RadonNode and recursively execute DispatchChildrenForDiff process of its child.

name: RadonComponent::UpdateRadonComponent
description: Update the data of the @args{componentName} component.

name: CreateVirtualComponent
description: Create virtual Component on Engine thread (historically known as "TASM Thread"). Component's name is @args{componentName}. One or more components form a virtual node tree, which is used for subsequent render and dispatch processes.

name: RadonComponent::DispatchForDiff
description: Create child nodes and update component attributes, then execute DispatchForDiff process for child nodes. Finally, send the "__OnReactComponentDidUpdate" to trigger the component's componentDidUpdate lifecycle method.

name: RadonBase::RadonMyersDiff
description: Diff process of the virtual node tree in Lynx using the MyersDiff algorithm.

name: RadonDispatchSelf
description: Create element and update attributes of the node if needed.

name: ElementManager::OnPatchFinishNoPatch
description: No changes happened in the update pipeline; it is considered a useless update.

name: ElementManager::OnPatchFinish
description: Execute tasks such as the layout of elements and the creation of platform UI views after the virtual nodes diff process is completed.

name: LynxUIOperationQueue::ExecuteOperation
description: Execute the platform ui operations, such as creating, inserting, updating, and deleting platform ui.

name: LynxUIOperationQueue::Flush
description: Synchronously execute UI operations, such as creating platform ui.

name: LynxUIOperationAsyncQueue::FlushInterval
description: Execute UI operations, such as creating platform ui.

name: LayoutContext::Layout
description: Layout stage. This stage is based on layout node tree to complete the layout stage, and finally synchronize the layout results to element. Element adjusts the layout results and generates UI layout op.

name: LayoutContext::RequestLayout
description: Request to trigger the Layout stage when layout related computed styles, such as width, height, are updated.

name: InvokeNativeModule
description: Invoke the NativeModule method with module name @args{module}, method name @args(method} and first_args @args{first_arg}.

name: Timing::OnPipelineStart
description: Start a pipeline. Pipeline trigger is @args{pipeline_origin}. About Lynx pipeline: @link{https://lynxjs.org/api/lynx-api/performance-api/performance-entry/pipeline-entry.html}

name: EventTracker::Flush
description: Send reporting tasks, such as Timing reports and LongTask detection reports, to the asynchronous thread.

name: FlushContentSizeAndOffsetToPlatform
description: Update content size and offset and flush content size and scroll info to platform ListContainerView.

name: LinearLayoutManager::PreloadToStart
description: Prerender of off-screen upper elements in the <list> component.

name: LinearLayoutManager::Preload
description: Pre-render off-screen list child components for c++ list.

name: RadonDiffListNode2::ComponentAtIndex
description: Render one list child component in ReactLynx2 or TTMLRadonDiff.

name: ListElement::ComponentAtIndex
description: Render one list child component in ReactLynx3 or TTMLNoDiff.

name: ListAdapter::UpdateDataSource
description: Parse diff result and list child component info in ReactLynx2 or TTMLRadonDiff for c++ list.

name: ListAdapter::UpdateFiberDataSource
description: Parse diff result and list child component info in ReactLynx3 or TTMLNoDiff for c++ list.

name: LazyBundle::RequireTemplateEntry
description: Send a request of LazyBundle on Main Thread Script(MTS). It is a necessary step to render a LazyBundle. However, it only occurs when rendering LazyBundle on IFR in ReactLynx3. @link{https://lynxjs.org/guide/interaction/ifr.html}

name: App::QueryComponent
description: Send a request of LazyBundle on Background Thread Script(BTS). It only occurs when rendering LazyBundle on ReactLynx3.

name: LynxUI.measure
description: The LynxUI measure process for <@args{#tag}> element.

name: UIOwner.createUI
description: Synchronously create platform ui for <@args{#tag}> element.

name: UIOwner.createUIAsync
description: Asynchronously create platform ui for <@args{#tag}> element.

name: LynxTemplateRender.draw
description: Draw LynxView and its children on Android.

name: LynxTemplateRender.layout
description: Layout LynxView and its children on Android.

name: LynxTemplateRender.measure
description: Measure LynxView and its children on Android, which may trigger starlight re-layout if MeasureSpec changes.

name: UIOwner.invokeUIMethodForSelectorQuery
description: Execute the UI method @args{method} of <@args{#tag}> element, triggered by NodesRef:invoke(). Reference: @link{https://lynxjs.org/api/lynx-api/nodes-ref/nodes-ref-invoke.html}

name: TextShadowNode.measure
description: Layout of <text> element's platform layout node, where the preview text are `@args{preview_text}`.

name: Interceptor.shouldRedirectImageUrl
description: Redirect the image URL. @link{https://lynxjs.org/api/lynx-native-api/resource-fetcher/mediaresourcefetcher#shouldredirecturl}

name: [UIOwner invokeUIMethodForSelectorQuery]
description: Execute the UI method @args{method} of <@args{#tag}> element, triggered by NodesRef:invoke().

name: [LynxUIExposure exposureHandler]
description: Check the exposure and disexposure states of LynxUIs  and send disexposure and exposure events to trigger custom exposure listeners. link: @link{https://lynxjs.org/guide/interaction/visibility-detection/exposure-ability.html}

name: [TextShadowNode measure]
description: Layout of <text> element's platform layout node, where the element's characters are @args{characters} or the first 50 characters are @args{first_fifty_characters}.

name: LayoutContext.Layout
description: Layout stage. This stage is based on layout node tree to complete the layout stage, and finally synchronize the layout results to element. Element adjusts the layout results and generates UI layout op.

name: LayoutContext.RequestLayout
description: Request to trigger the Layout stage when layout related computed styles, such as width, height, are updated.

name: FiberElement::Constructor
description: At this stage, based on the attribute of the element, the computed style and prop bundle of the element are generated and synchronized to the layout node. This stage will also create and modify layout node tree. At the same time, it will also generate platform UI operations.

name: NotifyJSUpdatePageData
description: After the frontend framework completes the initialization of the App object in the background thread, the Lynx framework will notify the frontend framework to update the page data.

name: LynxRuntime::CallJSApiCallbackWithValue
description: Execute BTS callbacks on the background scripting thread. They are typically triggered by scenarios such as: UI operation result returns, component update or loading completion, resource loading status notifications, and event handling responses, etc.

name: NativeModule::Invoke
description: Invoke the NativeModule method with module name @args{module}, method name @args(method} and first_args @args{first_arg}.

name: App::prepareAndEvalScript
description: Parse, and execute the script.

name: TimingMediator::TriggerSetupClientCallback
description: The setup phase callback of timing-api for native developer

name: LynxUIOperationQueue.Flush
description: Synchronously execute UI operations, such as creating platform ui.

name: LynxShell::TriggerVmGC
description: Trigger JavaScript VM garbage collection when memory pressure occurs.

name: LynxView.onMeasure
description: LynxView's onMeasure function, it is triggered by the Android system.

name: LynxView.onLayout
description: LynxView's onLayout function, it is triggered by the Android system.

name: LynxView.onDraw
description: LynxView's onDraw function, it is triggered by the Android system.

name: LynxView.onAttachedToWindow
description: LynxView's onAttachedToWindow function, it is triggered by the Android system.

name: LynxView.onDetachedFromWindow
description: LynxView's onDetachedFromWindow function, it is triggered by the Android system.

name: LynxView.updateViewport
description: Update LynxView's viewport.

name: LynxEnv.trimMemory
description: Dispatch memory pressure signal with level @args{pressure}.

name: LynxUIExposure.exposureHandler
description: Check the exposure and disexposure states of LynxUIs and send disexposure and exposure events to trigger custom exposure listeners. link: @link{https://lynxjs.org/guide/interaction/visibility-detection/exposure-ability.html}

name: NativePaintingCtxPlatformRef::ReconstructEventTargetTreeRecursively
description: Reconstruct platform event target tree recursively, which is used for platform event target exposure check, hit-test and execute ui method.

name: PlatformEventTargetExposure::DoExposureCheck
description: Do exposure check for platform event target. The main function is to detect viewport intersections between targets.

name: ApiCallBackManager::createCallbackImpl
description: Create a JS callback entry used for native-to-JS async invocation, and return the callback id to the caller.

name: updateData
description: Update the page-level data model from JS, and trigger the subsequent diff/render pipeline.

name: UpdateDataToTASM
description: Transfer the updated page data from background scripting thread to Engine thread (historically known as "TASM Thread") for rendering.

name: updateComponentData
description: Update a component's data payload from JS, typically for partial updates that target a specific component instance.

name: updateComponentDataToTASM
description: Transfer the updated component data from background scripting thread to Engine thread for diff/render.

name: triggerComponentEvent
description: Trigger a component event dispatch from JS (e.g., tap, change), and route it to the native event handling pipeline.

name: triggerComponentEventToTASM
description: Transfer a component event dispatch request from background scripting thread to Engine thread for handling.

name: selectComponent
description: Query and select components using a selector, returning results (e.g., nodes/fields) to the caller.

name: App::getPathInfo
description: Query path-related info for a resource or node (e.g., for resolving template/assets).

name: App::getEnv
description: Query the runtime environment information exposed to JS.

name: App::getFields
description: Query multiple fields from the native side and return them to JS (e.g., layout/measure/scroll related fields).

name: App::invokeUIMethod
description: Invoke a UI method on the native view/component side from JS (e.g., scrollTo, focus, setNativeProps).

name: callLepusMethod
description: Call a Lepus method exported by the template runtime, bridging arguments/results between JS and Lepus.

name: CallLepusMethodInner
description: Execute the internal path of calling a Lepus method (validation, conversion, dispatch), used by App/Lepus bridge.

name: generatePipelineOptions
description: Generate pipeline options for template loading/rendering based on inputs such as url, page options and runtime configuration.

name: triggerWorkletFunction
description: Trigger execution of a worklet function (off-main-thread or isolated execution unit) from the App runtime.

name: AnimationFrame
description: Execute one animation frame tick and run scheduled frame callbacks for the current page/runtime.

name: CardLifeTimeCallback:onDestroy
description: Invoke the card lifecycle onDestroy callback when a card is being torn down.

name: LepusValueToJSValue
description: Convert a Lepus value into a JS runtime value for bridging results/events from Lepus to JS.

name: PubValueToJSValue
description: Convert a Pub value into a JS runtime value for bridging between Pub and JS.

name: JSValueToLepusValue
description: Convert a JS runtime value into a Lepus value for bridging arguments/data from JS to Lepus.

name: JSValueToPubValue
description: Convert a JS runtime value into a Pub value for bridging arguments/data from JS to Pub.

name: App::LoadScriptAsync
description: Asynchronously load and execute a script resource referenced by @args{url}.

name: App::updateCardData
description: Update the card's data payload and trigger re-render or component update pipeline.

name: App::NotifyJSUpdateCardConfigData
description: Notify the JS framework to update card config data after native initialization or config changes.

name: App::EvalScript
description: Evaluate a JS script in the current JS runtime.

name: CallbackToLepusEvent
description: Convert a native callback result into a Lepus event and dispatch it to the Lepus/templating layer.

name: SendPageEvent
description: Send a page-level event from native to JS.

name: OnScriptLoaded
description: Handle script loaded completion, including post-load initialization hooks and error propagation.

name: batchedUpdateData:JSValueToLepusValue
description: Convert batched update data items from JS values into Lepus values before dispatching them to the Engine thread.

name: updateData:UpdateDataToTASM
description: Transfer updated data from background scripting thread to Engine thread as part of updateData processing.

name: BackgroundThread::SetTimeout
description: Schedule a JS timer task via setTimeout on background scripting thread.

name: BackgroundThread::SetInterval
description: Schedule a repeating JS timer task via setInterval on background scripting thread.

name: BackgroundThread::QueueMicrotask
description: Enqueue a microtask to be executed on the background scripting thread microtask queue.

name: App::PublishComponentEvent
description: Publish a component event from native to JS subscribers.

name: LynxJSUpdateComponentData
description: Execute the JS-side component data update entrypoint for Lynx (used by framework-driven updates).

name: NativeModule::Callback
description: Invoke a stored callback for a native module call.

name: InvokeCallback
description: Invoke a generic callback function holder used by module manager to dispatch callbacks into JS.

name: CallPlatformImplementation
description: Call a platform-specific implementation for a module method, bridging execution from JS to native platform layer.

name: NativeModule::PlatformCallbackStart
description: Mark the start of a platform callback path for a module call, used for latency tracking across thread hops.

name: CreateJSB Callback
description: Create a JSB callback wrapper that can be invoked from native and forwarded to JS.

name: JNIValueToJSValue
description: Convert JNI value into a JS runtime value for Android bridge interop.

name: PubValueToJNIValue
description: Convert Pub value into a JNI value for Android bridge interop.

name: ObjCValueToJSIValue
description: Convert Objective-C value into a JS runtime value for Apple platform bridge interop.

name: PubValueToObjCValue
description: Convert Pub value into an Objective-C value for Apple platform bridge interop.

name: SlotFunction
description: Execute a slot function bridging call from template runtime.

name: TriggerGC
description: Trigger a garbage collection cycle in the JS engine.

name: TriggerGCForTesting
description: Trigger a garbage collection cycle for testing or debug scenarios.

name: JsCacheManager::TryGetCache
description: Try to fetch a compiled JS cache entry from cache manager for faster startup.

name: evaluateJavaScript
description: Evaluate a JS source string in the JS engine.

name: evaluateJavaScriptBytecode
description: Evaluate a JS bytecode buffer in the JS engine.

name: LynxJSLoadCore
description: Load the core runtime JS bundles (e.g., lynx_core.js) and initialize the JS environment baseline.

name: BTSRuntime::PreloadJSSourcesGetter
description: Collect and build the preload JS sources (core JS and additional preload scripts) before creating the JS runtime.

name: Lynx::PrepareNapiEnvironment
description: Prepare and attach N-API environment to the runtime so native modules can be loaded and invoked.

name: LynxCreateAndLoadApp
description: Create the native App instance and perform initial app load/bootstrapping steps in the runtime.

name: TimeToInteractive
description: Mark the moment when runtime reaches "interactive" (runtime-ready) state for startup performance measurement.

name: JSExecutor::loadPreJSBundle
description: Load the pre-JS bundles required before template script execution, and create/init the JS runtime.

name: RuntimeManager::CreateJSRuntime
description: Create a JS runtime according to @args{group_id} and page options, including selecting engine type and sharing context if needed.

name: RuntimeManager::CreateSingleContextRuntime
description: Create a runtime in single-context mode (no shared JSContext across pages).

name: RuntimeManager::GetSharedJSContext
description: Lookup an existing shared JSContext by @args{group_id}.

name: RuntimeManager::SharedContextReused
description: Reuse an already-created shared JSContext for the same @args{group_id}.

name: RuntimeManager::CreateSharedContextFirstTime
description: Create the shared JSContext for @args{group_id} for the first time and register it for subsequent reuse.

name: RuntimeManager::JSContextWrapperInitGlobal
description: Initialize the global object/builtins for a new JSContextWrapper (global runtime setup).

name: RuntimeManager::JSContextWrapperPrepareJSEnv
description: Prepare JS environment by evaluating preloaded scripts (e.g., core JS) inside the context wrapper.

name: RuntimeManager::CreateRuntime
description: Create an engine runtime instance by (MakeRuntime), and set some runtime params.

name: RuntimeManager::MakeRuntime
description: Real make js engine's runtime.

name: JSContextWrapper::prepareJSEnv
description: Evaluate the preloaded JS scripts in the JS runtime to finish JS environment initialization.

name: RuntimeLifecycleObserver::OnRuntimeAttach
description: Notify runtime lifecycle observers that the JS runtime is attached and native modules can bind to it.

name: LynxRuntime::CallJSApiCallback
description: Invoke a BTS API callback on background scripting thread, typically for native-to-JS async completion.

name: DeserializeFunction
description: Deserialize a function object from serialized bytecode or snapshot data.

name: DeserializeGlobal
description: Deserialize global object/state from serialized data.

name: DeserializeTopVariables
description: Deserialize top-level variables from serialized data.

name: ReadStringDirectly
description: Read a string value directly from serialized/encoded buffer without additional decoding steps.

name: RegisterBuiltin
description: Register built-in functions/types into the runtime before user script execution.

name: QuickContext::LepusRefSetPropertyCallBack
description: Handle QuickContext property set callback for LepusRef, used by Lepus-JS bridging.

name: QuickContext::LepusRefGetPropertyCallBack
description: Handle QuickContext property get callback for LepusRef, used by Lepus-JS bridging.

name: QuickContext::LepusConvertToObjectCallBack
description: Convert a LepusRef into a JS object representation in QuickContext.

name: Context::CreateQuickContext
description: Create a QuickContext for executing LepusNG in the runtime.

name: Context::CreateVMContext
description: Create a VM-backed context for executing Lepus in the runtime.

name: Context::TryExecute
description: Try to execute a callable (script/function) in the context, capturing error information on failure.

name: Devtool::ON_NODE_CREATE
description: Emit a devtool event when a node is created.

name: Devtool::ON_AIR_NODE_CREATED
description: Emit a devtool event when an air node is created.

name: Devtool::ON_NODE_MODIFIED
description: Emit a devtool event when a node is modified.

name: Devtool::ON_NODE_ADDED
description: Emit a devtool event when a node is added.

name: Devtool::ON_NODE_REMOVED
description: Emit a devtool event when a node is removed.

name: InnerTranslateResourceForTheme
description: Translate resources under theme rules (e.g., swap assets or styles by theme) during template processing.

name: AttachPage
description: Attach a page into the render/runtime pipeline so it can participate in subsequent layout, render and event dispatch stages.

name: CreateVirtualNode
description: Create a virtual node in the engine-side virtual tree, used as an intermediate representation for rendering.

name: CreateVirtualPage
description: Create the virtual page root node that anchors the virtual tree for a page.

name: AppendChild
description: Append a child virtual node to a parent node.

name: AppendSubTree
description: Append a whole subtree under a parent node.

name: CloneSubTree
description: Clone an existing subtree to support reuse or dynamic component creation.

name: SetAttributeTo
description: Set an attribute on a virtual node (static/dynamic attrs resolved by template runtime).

name: SetContextData
description: Set context data associated with the current rendering context (page/component scoped).

name: SetStaticStyleTo2
description: Apply static style data to a node using a specific optimized path/version.

name: SetScriptEventTo
description: Bind a script event handler to a node for later dispatch from native to JS.

name: ComponentInfoFromContext
description: Build component metadata from context (e.g., resolved component name/path/id) for subsequent render steps.

name: AppendListComponentInfo
description: Append list component metadata into the component list used by list rendering/virtualization.

name: CreateVirtualPlug
description: Create a virtual plug node used by plugin/extension mechanism inside the virtual tree.

name: CreateVirtualPlugWithComponent
description: Create a virtual plug and associate it with a component.

name: MarkComponentHasRenderer
description: Mark a component as having rendered output, which can be used to optimize subsequent updates.

name: SetStaticAttrTo
description: Set a static attribute on a node (fast path for static attributes).

name: SetStyleTo
description: Set styles on a node (combined or resolved styles).

name: SetDynamicStyleTo
description: Set dynamic style values on a node.

name: SetStaticStyleTo
description: Set static style values on a node.

name: SetDataSetTo
description: Set dataset attributes on a node.

name: SetStaticEventTo
description: Bind a static event handler to a node.

name: SetClassTo
description: Set class attribute on a node.

name: SetStaticClassTo
description: Set static class attribute on a node.

name: SetId
description: Set the id attribute on a node.

name: GetComponentInfo
description: Query component metadata from the current context.

name: CreateSlot
description: Create a slot node/function used by template component composition.

name: SetProp
description: Set a property on a node/component instance.

name: SetData
description: Set data payload on a node/component instance.

name: AppendVirtualPlugToComponent
description: Add a virtual plug node to a component (alias of append virtual plug operation).

name: AddFallbackToDynamicComponent
description: Add fallback content to a dynamic component when target component cannot be resolved.

name: GetComponentData
description: Query component's data payload from the current context.

name: GetComponentProps
description: Query component's props from the current context.

name: GetComponentContextData
description: Query component's context data from the current context.

name: CreateComponentByName
description: Create a component instance by its registered name.

name: CreateDynamicVirtualComponent
description: Create a virtual component node for a dynamically resolved component.

name: ProcessComponentData
description: Process component data (normalize/convert) before applying it to the render pipeline.

name: LazyBundle::RenderEntrance
description: Enter the LazyBundle render path which defers template loading/execution until needed.

name: RegisterDataProcessor
description: Register a data processor used to transform data before it is applied to template/component updates.

name: AddEventListener
description: Add an event listener binding to the runtime/component.

name: ReFlushPage
description: Re-flush the page render pipeline (force refresh).

name: SetComponent
description: Set the component instance into the current render context (component binding for subsequent operations).

name: RegisterElementWorklet
description: Register an element-level worklet for executing isolated logic associated with an element.

name: CreateVirtualListNode
description: Create a virtual list node used by list components.

name: SendGlobalEvent
description: Send a global event from native/template runtime into the JS framework.

name: FiberCreateElement
description: Create a Fiber element node via FiberElement API.

name: FiberCreatePage
description: Create a Fiber page root node via FiberElement API.

name: FiberGetPageElement
description: Get the page root element from FiberElement API.

name: FiberCreateComponent
description: Create a Fiber component node.

name: FiberCreateView
description: Create a Fiber view element.

name: FiberCreateList
description: Create a Fiber list element.

name: FiberCreateScrollView
description: Create a Fiber scroll-view element.

name: FiberCreateText
description: Create a Fiber text element.

name: FiberCreateImage
description: Create a Fiber image element.

name: FiberCreateRawText
description: Create a Fiber raw-text element.

name: FiberCreateIf
description: Create a conditional (if) Fiber node.

name: FiberCreateFor
description: Create a loop (for) Fiber node.

name: FiberCreateBlock
description: Create a block/container Fiber node.

name: FiberAddConfig
description: Add config to a Fiber node or page context.

name: FiberSetConfig
description: Set/override config for a Fiber node or page context.

name: FiberCreateNonElement
description: Create a non-element Fiber node (placeholder).

name: FiberAppendElement
description: Append a Fiber child element to a parent element.

name: FiberRemoveElement
description: Remove a Fiber element from its parent.

name: FiberInsertElementBefore
description: Insert a Fiber element before another child element.

name: FiberFirstElement
description: Get the first child element of a Fiber element.

name: FiberLastElement
description: Get the last child element of a Fiber element.

name: FiberNextElement
description: Get the next sibling element of a Fiber element.

name: FiberAsyncResolveElement
description: Resolve a Fiber element asynchronously (e.g., lazy or deferred resolution).

name: FiberMarkAsyncResolveRoot
description: Mark the root as an async-resolve root for Fiber update propagation.

name: FiberAsyncResolveSubtreeProperty
description: Asynchronously resolve subtree properties for a Fiber node.

name: FiberReplaceElement
description: Replace one Fiber element with another element.

name: FiberReplaceElements
description: Replace multiple Fiber elements as a batch operation.

name: FiberSwapElement
description: Swap two Fiber elements in the tree.

name: FiberGetParent
description: Get the parent element of a Fiber element.

name: FiberGetChildren
description: Get the children list of a Fiber element.

name: FiberIsTemplateElement
